summary: Iteration 162: All 3 'body stream already read' bugs verified as FIXED. Backend APIs return valid responses. Frontend uses response.clone() fallback pattern. UI displays correctly with all required elements: Stripe Connect button, subscription tier cards with strikethrough prices, founding members 50% off banner, and virtual@blendlink.net support email.

stripe_connect_onboard.details: POST /api/payments/stripe/connect/onboard returns valid Stripe Connect URL (https://connect.stripe.com/...)

subscription_checkout_bronze.details: POST /api/subscriptions/checkout?tier=bronze returns checkout_url with cs_live_* prefix

response_json_valid.details: All API responses return valid JSON with Content-Type: application/json

wallet_page_loads.details: Wallet page loads correctly with all sections

wallet_withdraw_section.details: Withdraw Earnings section found with data-testid='withdraw-section'

wallet_stripe_connect_button.details: Connect Stripe Account button visible with data-testid='stripe-onboard-btn'

wallet_membership_section.details: Membership subscription section found with data-testid='membership-section'

wallet_founding_members_banner.details: Founding members 50% off banner found on Wallet page

wallet_tier_cards.details: All 4 tier cards (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond) found on Wallet page

wallet_strikethrough_prices.details: 4 strikethrough elements found for standard prices ($9.99, $19.99, $29.99, $59.99)

wallet_bl_coin_packages.details: Top Up BL Coins section with all 4 packages found

subscriptions_page_loads.details: Subscriptions page loads with Memberships header

subscriptions_founding_members_banner.details: Founding members 50% off banner with 'Limited Time Only!' text found

subscriptions_all_tiers.details: All 4 tier cards found with data-testid='tier-card-*'

subscriptions_strikethrough_prices.details: 4 elements with line-through class showing standard prices: $9.99, $19.99, $29.99, $59.99

subscriptions_support_email.details: Support email virtual@blendlink.net displayed (not old support@blendlink.net)

subscriptions_upgrade_button.details: Upgrade buttons work - 'Upgrade to Bronze Member - $4.99/mo $9.99' with strikethrough

subscriptions_how_it_works.details: How Subscriptions Work info section present

body_stream_fix_api_js.description: apiRequest now uses response.clone() fallback pattern to prevent body stream already read errors

body_stream_fix_wallet_jsx.description: Subscription checkout now uses api.post() instead of raw fetch(), going through robust apiRequest

body_stream_fix_subscription_tiers_jsx.description: handleUpgrade now uses api.post() instead of raw fetch(), going through robust apiRequest

body_stream_fix_member_pages_api.description: safeFetch uses response.clone() fallback pattern for production proxy compatibility

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 162 body stream fixes verified. The fix pattern is: 1) Clone response before reading with response.clone(), 2) Try to read body as text from original response, 3) If that fails, try reading from cloned response. This prevents 'body stream already read' errors from production CDN/proxy layers. Both Wallet.jsx and SubscriptionTiers.jsx subscription checkout flows now use api.post() instead of raw fetch to benefit from this robust handling.
